title: Copying Files
subtitle: Duplicate files with cp

sections.instruction: Sometimes you want to copy a file — keep the original and make a duplicate.
sections.prompt: Copy `index.html` to the `backup` folder: `cp index.html backup/index.html`.

onSuccess.message: Copied! The original is still here, and a copy is in backup/.

sections.instruction: You can also copy and rename at the same time.

onSuccess.message: The copy has a different name. `cp` always takes two arguments: source and destination.

sections.instruction: Verify both copies are in the backup folder.

onSuccess.message: Both files are there. Originals untouched.

completionMessage: You can now copy files with `cp`. The original stays in place, and a duplicate appears at the destination.
